title: Vape Store Miami: Prologue
description:
PROLOGUE NOTICE

Store progression in the prologue is limited. The full game experience is available in the full game.

Stock shelves, order products, serve customers, check out orders, answer calls, process online sales, ship packages, and keep your reputation strong.

Build the store your way in this vape shop simulator, and stay in control of every part of the business.

Cut costs and boost profits by mixing your own e-liquids.

Order ingredients, apply recipes, and sell your products in-store.

Bring your vape shop vision to life.

Customize the floors, walls, ceilings, and store equipment to create a space that truly stands out.

Play Vape Store Miami with friends in 1–4 player co-op.

Share tasks, split responsibilities, and keep the business running smoothly together.

Customers can place orders by phone or online.

Pack each order, then ship it out or hand it over depending on the customer’s preference.

Every customer has their own personality, expectations, and attitude.

Make the right choices, keep customers happy, and word will spread.

Make too many mistakes, and your reputation will take the hit.

Run a clean, reliable store to earn better scores and unlock new benefits.
description_short: Get your first taste of running a retro Miami vape shop in this 1–4 player co-op simulator prologue. Stock shelves, serve customers, craft custom e-liquids, handle phone and online orders, build your reputation, and lay the foundation for a growing business.
